name: Lamb Chops with Red Pepper Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Place lamb chops approximately 1/2 inch thick on a greased grill over medium-high heat.
2. Grill the peppers for about 20 minutes or until charred all sides. Let them cool enough to handle, then peel, core, and seed.
3. Puree the peppers in a food processor until smooth. Add basil, oil, and cheese; puree until well blended. Stir in garlic, salt, and pepper to taste. (Pesto can be refrigerated for up to 2 days; thin with more olive oil if necessary.)
4. Place lamb on the greased grill over medium-high heat. Grill for 5 to 7 minutes per side for medium-rare or until desired doneness. Serve with red pepper pesto.
